body:
## Rationale

drummerEvolution pages (/drummers/[slug]/evolution) build GSC long-tail coverage and LLM citation depth by documenting each drummer's gear and style progression across eras. Batch 13 targets three active MetalForge entities not covered in the 17 live entries (lars/joey/portnoy/haake/brann/lombardo/hoglan/igor/danny/matt-greiner/shannon/mario/paul-m/vinnie/george-k/flo/eloy) or batches 9-12.

### Ben Koller
- **Why now:** #1 new GA4 entity this week (9 views / 8 users on /drummer/ben-koller). Multiple album article proposals building his cluster (#2995, #2953).
- **Evolution arc:** Early 1990s DIY hardcore → Converge formation (1990) → Jane Doe-era breakthrough (2001, Hydra Head) → 'You Fail Me'/'No Heroes' stripped-down phase (2004-2006) → Axe to Fall layered complexity (2009) → modern hardcore elder statesman
- **Gear story:** Raw DIY kits → Tama/Pearl hybrid → current polished setup. The evolution shows how chaos became controlled precision.

### Pete Sandoval
- **Why now:** 50% GSC CTR (high-efficiency signal). Blast beat pioneer — his evolution story is essentially 'the history of extreme metal drumming speed'.
- **Evolution arc:** Early Morbid Angel (1988, before Altars of Madness) → Altars (1989) → Covenant speed peak (1993) → health decline + return → final Morbid Angel albums. Retirement 2011 after major back surgery.
- **Gear story:** Pearl Reference progression across extreme speeds. Health narrative gives the evolution page human depth.

### Mikkey Dee
- **Why now:** Active GSC signal, Bad Magic proposal (#2996) filed this run. 23-year unbroken Motörhead arc ends with Lemmy's death.
- **Evolution arc:** Pre-Motörhead (King Diamond drummer, 1988-1992) → Bastards debut (1993) → touring powerhouse → final Motörhead era (Bad Magic, 2015). Post-Motörhead: Scorpions (2016-present).
- **Gear story:** Pearl/Premier kits progression through 27 years of non-stop touring. One of the longest unbroken metal drum tenures.

**Dedup verified:** None of these 3 appear in drummerEvolution.js (confirmed: blake-richardson IS in DB from batch 8/GearEvo-8 merge, but ben-koller, pete-sandoval, mikkey-dee are NOT). Not in batches 9-12 proposals.

## Files to touch

- `packages/frontend/data/drummerEvolution.js` — add entries for `ben-koller`, `pete-sandoval`, `mikkey-dee`
- `public/llms/articles/ben-koller-evolution.md` — new LLM markdown file
- `public/llms/articles/pete-sandoval-evolution.md` — new LLM markdown file
- `public/llms/articles/mikkey-dee-evolution.md` — new LLM markdown file

(Follow exact pattern of existing evolution entries — check lars-ulrich or joey-jordison entries for field names.)

## Template / data shape

Each evolution entry needs:
- `slug`, `drummer` (name), `drummerId`
- `eras`: array of era objects, each with `id`, `years`, `title`, `description`, `gear` object, `albums`
- At least 3 eras per drummer (early/mid/modern or equivalent)
- `summary` field: 100-150 word overall progression narrative

## Quality gate

- ≥3 eras per drummer
- ≥300 words total per evolution page
- Internal links to drummer profile (/drummer/[slug]) and at least 1 album article per era
- 3 LLM markdown files ≥200 words each
- Page renders at /drummers/[slug]/evolution

## Estimated organic uplift

Evolution pages target long-tail queries like 'how has X drummer's style changed over time?', 'what kit did X use early in their career?', 'X drummer 2000s gear'. These serve LLM conversational queries and build the content graph depth that differentiates MetalForge from gear-only sites. Ben Koller's GA4 surge makes this a momentum add — evolution page published while interest peaks.

## Verify

1. 3 new entries in drummerEvolution.js (ben-koller, pete-sandoval, mikkey-dee)
2. Each evolution page renders at /drummers/ben-koller/evolution, /drummers/pete-sandoval/evolution, /drummers/mikkey-dee/evolution
3. Each page has ≥3 era sections with gear + album details
4. 3 LLM markdown files created at public/llms/articles/
5. Internal links to /drummer/[slug] present in each evolution page

## Done

- [ ] ben-koller evolution added to drummerEvolution.js
- [ ] pete-sandoval evolution added to drummerEvolution.js
- [ ] mikkey-dee evolution added to drummerEvolution.js
- [ ] 3 LLM markdown files created
title: SEO batch: Drummer Evolution batch 13 — Ben Koller + Pete Sandoval + Mikkey Dee (~3 pages + 3 LLM files)
